name: Apple or Plum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pastry onto a greased baking sheet.
2. For the fruit topping: peel and core the apples, cutting them into slices or quarters (if very large, divide into eighths). If using plums, rub clean and stone them.
3. Distribute the fruit evenly over the pastry. Lay plums with the insides upwards.
4. Fold a piece of greased paper several times and place it against the pastry at the open side of the baking sheet.
5. Pre-heat the oven for 5 minutes at very hot, then bake at moderately hot.
6. Baking time: 15-25 minutes.
7. After baking, when the cake has cooled somewhat, sprinkle with sugar.
